name: YTLite
subtitle: Lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+
description: A lightweight YouTube client with SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, and up to 1080p playback. No ads, no tracking, no dependencies.

apps.name: YTLite
apps.subtitle: YouTube client for iOS 12+

versions.localizedDescription:
New Features
- Videos now start instantly — PO token generation moved from startup to on-demand
- YouTube Mix playlists — play mixes as ordered video queues
- Flexible cache system with configurable image/feed cache durations
- Cross-device watch progress sync via server
- Periodic OAuth token refresh every 12 hours
- Auto-refresh token on 401 before showing auth screen

Improvements
- Home feed scroll performance: image downsampling, prefetching, layout fixes
- Resume playback: videos watched 97%+ now start from the beginning
- Duration parsing from badge overlays, views/date for co-authored videos
- Thumbnail refresh from FEhistory
- Renamed "Show Shorts" to "Show YouTube Shorts"

Bug Fixes
- Black screen after background sleep + playback recovery
- Channel banner race condition: load TV data first, enrich with WEB metadata in background
- Missing back button when opening channel from History in Library tab
- Subscriptions page jumping on pagination — videos now append without re-sorting
- Channel avatar for mix videos

apps.localizedDescription: A lightweight YouTube client for iOS 12+. No ads, no tracking. Features: SponsorBlock, Return YouTube Dislike, 1080p playback, background audio, PiP, subtitles, and more.
